steps.title: Identify the clause structure
steps.content: A subject (“The word 'flummox'”) and introductory adverb (“first”) precede the blank, followed by a prepositional phrase. This is an incomplete independent clause.

steps.title: Select the correct verb form
steps.content:
A simple past tense finite verb is required to complete the independent clause. “Appeared” is the simple past tense of appear and functions as the main verb.

The other choices are non-finite forms (infinitive, present participle, perfect participle) that cannot serve as a main verb.

That is the correct answer.
